tasks.query: REPLICATE [synctest].[SPITQT3] ([SPCODE] string, [SPCONO] decimal, [SPITCD] string, [SPWHLO] string, PRIMARY KEY([SPCODE], [SPCONO], [SPITCD], [SPWHLO])) WITH enableparallelreadpartitioning = 'false', DeletionBehavior = 'HardDelete', stringtrimmode = 'Both', DropTable = 'false' SELECT * FROM [DAVY1].[SPITQT]
